description: Seurat quality control (First step in the Seurat Suite), using Seurat version 4.0.3.
author: Edwin F. Juarez & Jonathan Zamora;UCSD - Mesirov Lab
plan:
## Seurat.QC GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
Seurat.QC is a GenePattern module that Seurat quality control (First step in the Seurat Suite), using Seurat version 4.0.3.

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 9 parameters:
- Required: file_name, first_feature, second_feature, export_txt
- Optional: input_file, hca_url, column_name, pattern, third_feature

### 3. Command Line
```
Rscript --no-save --quiet --no-restore <libdir>seurat_qc.R <input_file><hca_url> --column_name <column_name> --pattern <pattern> --first_feature <first_feature> --second_feature <second_feature> --third_feature <third_feature> --file_name <file_name> --export_txt <export_txt>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: genepattern/seurat-qc\:3.3

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: input_file
parameters.description: 10x zip file to load or Loom file from HCA.

parameters.name: hca_url
parameters.description: URL to the Project Loom file from the Human Cell Atlas, obtained by the HCA api.

parameters.name: column_name
parameters.description: Column name of percent mitochondrial genes. \nNote\: not all datasets have this column, those who do often times name it percent.mt.

parameters.name: pattern
parameters.description: What pattern to use to label mitochondrial genes [often times this is annotated as MT-].

parameters.name: file_name
parameters.description: Basename of the file to be saved.

parameters.name: first_feature
parameters.description: First feature to plot as a violin plot [recommended to be the number of genes per cell, nFeature_RNA].

parameters.name: second_feature
parameters.description: Second feature to plot as a violin plot [recommended to be the number of reads per cell, nCount_RNA].

parameters.name: third_feature
parameters.description: Third feature to plot as a violin plot [typically percent.mt]. Leave blank if you don't want this to be plotted.

parameters.name: export_txt
parameters.description: Wether or not to create a TXT file compatible with some other modules (this requires a large amount of memory and for large datasets it causes unpredicted errors).
